failed_attempts:
intro N
  let K := max 20 (N ^ 2 + 1)
  have ⟨p, hp, hpdvd, hpgt⟩ : ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ (K !)^2 + 1 ∧ p > K := by
    let M := (K !)^2 + 1
    have hM_gt_1 : M > 1 := Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.pos_pow_of_pos _ (Nat.factorial_pos _))
    obtain ⟨p, hp, hpdvd⟩ := Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd (Nat.ne_of_gt hM_gt_1)
    refine ⟨p, hp, hpdvd, ?_⟩
    by_contra! hle
    have : p ∣ K ! := Nat.dvd_factorial (Nat.Prime.pos hp) hle
    have : p ∣ 1 := (Nat.dvd_add_iff_right (Nat.dvd_trans this (Nat.dvd_pow_self _ (by decide)))).mp hpdvd
    exact Nat.Prime.not_dvd_one hp this
  have hp4 : p % 4 = 1 := by
    have : p ≠ 2 := by
      intro h; rw [h] at hpdvd
      have : (K !)^2 + 1 % 2 = 1 := by
        rw [Nat.add_mod, Nat.pow_mod, Nat.mul_mod, Nat.factorial_even (le_max_left _ _), zero_mul]
        rfl
      rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero] at hpdvd
      rw [this] at hpdvd; contradiction
    have : IsSquare (-1 : ZMod p) := by
      use K !
      rw [← ZMod.int_cast_eq_int_cast_iff, ZMod.int_cast_cast, Int.cast_neg, Int.cast_one, ZMod.int_cast_cast]
      rw [← ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd] at hpdvd
      rw [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_one] at hpdvd
      simp only [Nat.cast_pow, ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_val] at hpdvd
      rw [hpdvd]; ring
    rwa [ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_iff_mod_four_ne_three, Nat.Prime.mod_four_ne_three_iff_mod_four_eq_one hp this] at this

  have hp20 : p > 20 := lt_of_le_of_lt (le_max_left _ _) hpgt
  have hpN : p > N ^ 2 + 1 := lt_of_le_of_lt (le_max_right _ _) hpgt

  have : IsSquare (-1 : ZMod p) := by
    rwa [ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_iff_mod_four_ne_three, hp4]
    decide
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := this
  let n := min x.val (p - x.val)

  have hn_bounds : 1 ≤ n ∧ 2 * n < p := by
    have hx0 : x.val ≠ 0 := by intro h; simpa [h] using hx
    have hxp : x.val < p := x.val_lt
    constructor
    · apply le_min
      · exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hx0
      · apply Nat.sub_pos_of_lt; exact hxp
    · have : n ≤ x.val := min_le_left _ _
      have : n ≤ p - x.val := min_le_right _ _
      omega

  have hn_sq : n ^ 2 % p = p - 1 := by
    have : x.val ^ 2 % p = p - 1 := by
      rw [← ZMod.int_cast_eq_int_cast_iff, ZMod.int_cast_cast, Int.cast_pow, ZMod.int_cast_cast, hx]
      simp
    unfold n; split_ifs
    · exact this
    · rw [Nat.sub_pow_two, Nat.mul_mod_right]; simp [Nat.pow_mod, this]

  have hn_dvd : p ∣ n ^ 2 + 1 := by
    rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, Nat.add_mod, hn_sq, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.Prime.pos hp), Nat.mod_self]

  have hn_ge_N : n ≥ N := by
    by_contra! h
    apply not_le_of_lt hpN
    exact Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.succ_pos _) hn_dvd) 
      (Nat.add_le_add_right (Nat.pow_le_pow_left (Nat.le_of_lt h) 2) 1)

  refine ⟨n, hn_ge_N, p, hp, hn_dvd, ?_⟩
  rw [Real.gt_iff_lt, lt_sub_iff_add_lt', Real.lt_sqrt (by positivity), sq_sub]
  norm_cast

  have h_cong : (p - 2 * n) ^ 2 + 4 ≡ 0 [MOD p] := by
    rw [Nat.sub_mod_eq_mod_sub_mod (hn_bounds.2.le), Nat.pow_mod, Nat.add_mod]
    simp [Nat.mul_mod_left, Nat.mul_mod_right, hn_sq, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.Prime.pos hp)]

  obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ : p ∣ (p - 2 * n) ^ 2 + 4 := h_cong.dvd
  have hm_eq : (p - 2 * n) ^ 2 = m * p - 4 := by
    rw [hm]; omega

  cases m with
  | zero => rw [zero_mul] at hm; have := hn_bounds.2; linarith
  | succ m =>
    cases m with
    | zero =>
      simp only [one_mul] at hm_eq
      have : p - 4 > 2 * n := by
        have hsub : p - 2 * n = (p - 4).sqrt := by rw [hm_eq, Nat.sqrt_sq]
        rw [lt_sub_iff_add_lt, hsub]
        apply lt_sub_iff_add_lt'.mp
        apply Nat.lt_sqrt.mpr
        rw [sq]; omega
      norm_cast; linarith
    | succ m =>
      have : m.succ.succ * p - 4 > 2 * n := by
        calc m.succ.succ * p - 4 ≥ 2 * p - 4 := by gcongr; omega
          _ > 2 * n := by have := hn_bounds.2; omega
      rw [hm_eq]; norm_cast; linarith
